hypothesis: Yui's first complete episode: her full five-step Daily Loop (notice, anxious, withdraw, hesitate, stays anyway) staged as one continuous private sequence with no viewer-address beat at all, ending on a posture built from the start to loop back to the opening frame, tests whether existence-permission anxiety (distinct from Nao's relational-acknowledgment mechanic) drives repeat viewing on its own terms per BRAND_IDENTITY.md's Fetishism lever.

act_structure.act_3: 18.0-28.0s: withdrawal completes into a private calculation to leave, then hesitates
act_structure.act_4: 28.0-37.0s: hesitation resolves into staying, settles toward opening posture
act_structure.bridge: 37.0-41.0s: image-to-video interpolation approaching (not landing on) Act 1's opening frame
